introSection: Journey to Atlantis is a water roller coaster located at SeaWorld San Diego in San Diego, California, USA. The ride combines roller coaster elements with water ride elements. It opened in 2004 and was manufactured by Mack Rides.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Journey to Atlantis opened on May 29, 2004.

On November 1, 2024, the park announced that Journey to Atlantis would close later in the year for refurbishment. It reopened on August 23, 2025 with a new story line.

fullText:
Journey to Atlantis is a water roller coaster located at SeaWorld San Diego in San Diego, California, USA. The ride combines roller coaster elements with water ride elements. It opened in 2004 and was manufactured by Mack Rides.

Journey to Atlantis opened on May 29, 2004.

On November 1, 2024, the park announced that Journey to Atlantis would close later in the year for refurbishment. It reopened on August 23, 2025 with a new story line.
